attributes.action: Change the school week to 4 days, by having an extra 10 mins a day.
attributes.additional_details: So that students get more rest and longer weekends to help with the increased workload as you go up the school years.
attributes.background: I would like to change the school times, so that there would only be 4 days in the school week instead of 5. However, to accomomadate for the learning hours lost, you could add an extra 10 mins onto each day to compensate. Overall, people will get the same amount of learning hours.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Reduce school to 4 days a week and have optional extra activities
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756710
